title: Here's how a government shutdown can cause a major financial crisis
text: As a government shutdown appears likely, Americans are preparing for disruptions to food aid, air travel, and much more. Worse yet, it's also possible that a prolonged shutdown could contribute to systemic stress in U.S. financial markets.

title: A Look at Bridgewater's Top Financial Holdings as Dalio Predicts US Debt Crisis
text: Bridgewater Associates, the hedge fund founded by renowned billionaire investor Ray Dalio (Trades, Portfolio), is known for its culture of radical transparency, considering itself an “idea-meritocracy” where the best ideas win.

title: CME Group (CME) Rises 19% YTD: Can It Retain the Bull Run?
text: CME Group's (CME) global presence, compelling product portfolio and focus on over-the-counter clearing services and effective capital deployment poise it well for growth.

title: CME Group to Launch Micro Henry Hub Futures and Options on November 6
text: CHICAGO , Sept. 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced that it will launch Micro Henry Hub futures and options on November 6, pending all relevant regulatory reviews.

title: CME Group: Still The Perfect Fit For An All-Weather Portfolio
text: The article discusses CME Group's performance year to date, with a focus on the current interest rate environment and volatile equity markets. The company beat both revenue and earnings estimates in Q2, and key performance indicators such as ADV and average RPC confirm continued strong performance. While interest rate and equity index-related products continue to be primarily responsible for the strong performance, investors shouldn't underestimate the potential of CME's market data and information segment.

title: CME Group to Launch Cobalt Hydroxide Futures on October 23
text: CHICAGO , Sept. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced that it will launch Cobalt Hydroxide futures on October 23, pending all relevant regulatory reviews.

title: CME Group Opens Registration for its 20th Annual Global University Trading Challenge
text: CHICAGO , Sept. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced registration is now open for the 20th annual CME Group University Trading Challenge, which will be held from Sunday, October 1 to Friday, October 27.

title: CME launches options for micro gold, silver futures as mini markets see solid growth
text: (Kitco News) - Precious metals investors could soon have more product choices in the marketplace as the CME looks to launch new options on micro gold and silver futures.

title: CME Group Inc. Announces Third-Quarter 2023 Earnings Release, Conference Call
text: CHICAGO , Sept. 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CME Group Inc. will announce earnings for the third quarter of 2023 before the markets open on Wednesday, October 25, 2023.

title: CME Group and DTCC Receive Regulatory Approval for Enhanced Treasury Cross-Margining Arrangement Launching January 2024
text: CHICAGO and NEW YORK and LONDON and HONG KONG and SINGAPORE and SYDNEY , Sept. 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, and The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC), the premier post-trade market infrastructure for the global financial services industry, today announced their enhanced cross-margining arrangement has received Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) approvals.

title: CME Group Announces Record Volume Across Suite of Short-Term WTI Options
text: CHICAGO , Sept. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced that trading in its suite of WTI weekly options, the company's fastest growing energy products, reached record average daily volume in August of 12,291 contracts.

title: CME Group to Launch T-Bill Futures on October 2, as U.S. Treasury Futures Open Interest Hits Record 19.8 Million Contracts
text: CHICAGO , Sept. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CME Group , the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced that it will expand its benchmark interest rates offering with the launch of U.S. Treasury Bill (T-Bill) futures on October 2, pending regulatory review.

title: CME Group Reports Second-Highest August ADV on Record
text: Double-digit growth in Interest Rate, Energy, Agricultural, Metals and options products Highest-volume August for Equity Index futures and options and Agricultural options products CHICAGO , Sept. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Amid ongoing geopolitical, economic and weather-related uncertainties, CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today reported its August 2023 market statistics, including average daily volume (ADV) of 24.2 million contracts, an increase of 14% from 2022 and the second-highest ADV for the month of August on record.

title: CME Group (CME) Rises 20.6% YTD: Time to Buy the Stock?
text: CME Group's (CME) global presence, compelling product portfolio and focus on over-the-counter clearing services and effective capital deployment poise it well for growth.
